title: Wings of Victory
writer: Georgi Bajdukov, Boris Chirskov, Dmitriy Tarasov
actors: Vladimir Belokurov, Mikheil Gelovani, Semyon Mezhinsky
plot: Valeriy Chkalov is a name-dream, a name-legend and not only for passionate admirers of the heavenly spheres. He became the first pilot to cross the North Pole and land in America. The brave, daring, mischievous, often reckless con...
